frame_description: The 'Let's get started' page loads with 'I'm Buying' and 'I'm Refinancing' options.

description: User hovers over the 'I'm Refinancing' card.
frame_description: Cursor is over the 'I'm Refinancing' card.

description: User clicks on 'I'm Refinancing'.
frame_description: The card is selected, and the UI updates.

description: The 'What's the purpose of your loan?' section appears.
frame_description: New form content appears below the initial selection cards.

description: User scrolls down to see the 'Live in' and 'Invest' details.
frame_description: User scrolls through the newly appeared form section.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: The 'Continue' button at the bottom of the section is clicked.

description: The 'Before you begin' checklist appears.
frame_description: A checklist with 'Your property', 'Borrowers', and 'Your financials' is displayed.

description: User hovers over the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: Cursor is over the 'Continue' button below the checklist.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: The button is clicked, initiating navigation to the next form step.

description: Navigation to 'Let's find your property' page.
frame_description: The 'Let's find your property' page loads.

description: User hovers over the 'What's your property address?' input field.
frame_description: Cursor is positioned over the address text input.

description: User types '11 dwyer' into the address field.
frame_description: The text '11 dwyer' appears in the address input field.

description: Address suggestions dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of addresses starting with '11 Dwyer' is displayed below the input field.

description: User hovers over various address suggestions in the dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves over several items in the address suggestion list.

description: User selects '11 Dwyer Street, Cavendish VIC 3314' from the suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the specific address suggestion.

description: User clicks the 'Property type' dropdown.
frame_description: The dropdown menu opens, showing options like House, Townhouse, etc.

description: User selects 'House' from the dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'House' in the dropdown list.

description: User clicks on the 'Estimated property value' field.
frame_description: The input field for property value is focused.

description: User types '800,000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The value '$ 800,000' is entered into the field.

description: User hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Cursor is over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the form.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The button is clicked, initiating a transition to the next page.

description: Navigation to 'Tell us about your loan' page.
frame_description: The 'Tell us about your loan' page loads.

description: User scrolls down the 'Tell us about your loan' page.
frame_description: User scrolls through the loan details form.

description: User selects the 'Two of us' radio button.
frame_description: The user clicks the radio button for 'Two of us'.

description: Name input fields for two borrowers appear.
frame_description: Fields for 'What's your first name?' and 'What's your co-borrower's first name?' appear.

description: User clicks on the 'What's your first name?' field.
frame_description: The first name input field is focused.

description: User types 'serene' into the first name field.
frame_description: The name 'serene' is entered into the field.

description: User clicks on the 'What's your co-borrower's first name?' field.
frame_description: The co-borrower name input field is focused.

description: User types 'ned' into the co-borrower name field.
frame_description: The name 'ned' is entered into the field.

description: User scrolls further down the loan details page.
frame_description: User scrolls past the name fields to the 'Why are you refinancing?' section.

description: Hover over the 'Save money' radio button option.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Tell us about your loan' page of the Unloan application, specifically the 'Property and loan' section.

description: Hover over the 'Better digital tools and services' radio button option.
frame_description: The cursor is moving down the list of refinancing reasons on the form.

description: Click into the 'Amount' input field.
frame_description: The cursor is inside the 'Amount' text box, which is now focused.

description: Type '500,000' into the loan amount field.
frame_description: The value '$ 500,000' is visible in the input field.

description: Hover over the 'No' radio button for taking cash out.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'No' option under the question 'Would you like to take cash out using the equity of your property?'.

description: Click the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is activated.

description: A 'Welcome' modal appears over the page, asking for an email address.
frame_description: A white modal with the heading 'Welcome' and an 'Email Address*' field is displayed in the center of the screen.

description: Navigate to the next section of the loan application.
frame_description: The screen flashes white and then loads a page titled 'Tell us about your loan' with different form fields.

description: Scroll down the application form.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards, revealing fields for co-borrower names.

description: Hover over the 'income' step in the application sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor is over the third item in the 'Your loan application' list on the left.

description: The UI changes to the 'Let's find your property' step.
frame_description: The heading 'Let's find your property' is now visible.

description: The UI changes to the 'Before you begin' summary screen.
frame_description: The screen shows eligibility criteria under the heading 'Before you begin'.

description: The UI changes to the 'What's the purpose of your loan?' screen.
frame_description: The screen displays loan purpose options.

description: Scroll down through the 'Unloan Features' and 'Loan details' sections.
frame_description: The user is scrolling past interest rate tables and loan amount/term details.

description: Hover over the 'Learn about how LMI works and why it is applied' link.
interaction_target: Learn about how LMI works and why it is applied
frame_description: The cursor is over a blue text link within the 'No Unloan fees' section.

description: Scroll down through loyalty discounts, redraw features, and repayment details.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the 'Unloan app' and 'Repayments' headings.

description: Scroll back up the page.
frame_description: The page content moves downwards rapidly.

description: Scroll down to the footer of the page.
frame_description: The footer with various links like 'Buy a Home', 'Refinance', and 'Calculators' is visible.

description: Hover over the 'Buy a home' link in the footer.
frame_description: The cursor is over the first link under the 'Home Loans' column in the footer.

description: A task description overlay appears on the screen.
frame_description: An overlay with the heading 'Task' and instructions for the user testing session is displayed.

description: Click the 'End Task' button.
frame_description: The user activates the 'End Task' button at the bottom right of the overlay.
